description:
## Goal

Move the periodic memory/health reporter out of `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` into a dedicated `src/fetcher/refresh_health_reporter.cr`. This follows the convention already established by `src/fetcher/refresh_health_monitor.cr` (one file, one concern, public class-level methods).

## Source: src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr (current location)

Move:
- `def self.start_health_reporter` (~lines 480-520)

## Target: src/fetcher/refresh_health_reporter.cr

Design as a small class or module:

```crystal
module RefreshLoop::HealthReporter
  REPORT_INTERVAL = 5.minutes

  def self.start : Nil
    spawn(name: "health_monitor_reporter") do
      loop do
        break if QuickHeadlines.shutting_down?
        interruptible_sleep(REPORT_INTERVAL)
        break if QuickHeadlines.shutting_down?
        report_status
      rescue ex : Exception
        Log.for("quickheadlines.feed").error(exception: ex) { "Health monitor reporter error" }
      end
    end
  end

  def self.report_status : Nil
    # current body of the inner loop
  end
end
```

Splitting the inner body into `report_status` makes the code testable in isolation (mock `RefreshHealthMonitor`, `MemoryManagerActor`, `SocketManager`, `EventBroadcaster`, `FiberTracker`).

## Acceptance

- `src/fetcher/refresh_health_reporter.cr` exists with the moved code.
- `src/fetcher/refresh_loop.cr` no longer contains `start_health_reporter`.
- The supervisor (or `refresh_loop.cr` start) calls `RefreshLoop::HealthReporter.start` (or whatever name is chosen) instead.
- `just nix-build` succeeds.
- `nix develop . --command crystal spec` passes.

## Notes

- The body has three nested `begin ... rescue` blocks (for shutdown check, for status logging, for memory status diagnostics). Preserve this defensive layering.
- The reporter is on the suspect list for the in-flight P0 memory-growth ticket `quickhea-alz` because it logs every 5 minutes and reads from many actors — keep that in mind but do NOT change behavior as part of this ticket.
title: Extract periodic health/memory reporter into src/fetcher/refresh_health_reporter.cr
